nav.userAreaDesc: Sign in to manage finances and customers.

auth.loginSubtitle: Google — or email and password if issued by your admin.
auth.googleHint: We never see your Google password.
auth.loginFoot: Google: only after subscription approval. New user?
auth.errorConfig: Server configuration issue (check Google env vars).
auth.errorOAuth: Email already exists — try Google again.
auth.errorCredentials: Sign-in failed — check email and password.
auth.reasonNoAccount: No active account for this email. Register or contact your admin.
auth.reasonPending: Your account is pending admin approval.
auth.credError: Wrong email/password — or no password issued yet.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Submit details — an admin will approve the subscription and send access details.

scanner.title: Multi-engine AI scanner
scanner.subtitle: PDF, Office, images, CSV, JSON, XML. Choose AI provider in the hub — Gemini recommended for PDF.

scanner.dropDark: Drag files here, or click to browse

cookie.title: Cookies
cookie.body: We use cookies for essential functionality and analytics. By continuing you agree.
cookie.wallBody: We use essential cookies for the site and sign-in. You may also allow analytics and marketing — your choice.

language.label: Language
language.hint: Auto-detected from your device; you can change anytime.

erpPage.geminiBody: Missing Gemini key on the server. Set
erpPage.geminiCode: in .env.local and Vercel (Environment Variables), then restart the server.
erpPage.searchHint: Search results for: "{q}" ({count}) · total expenses in view: ₪{total}
erpPage.statAvgTrend: Based on total expenses in current view

landing.footerTagline: BSD-YBM Intelligence System | The avenue that connects everyone
landing.featureCrmDesc: Manage subscriptions and dormant customers with AI.
landing.featureInvDesc: Invoices for every business type — Kano-grade standard.
landing.tutorialIntro: Animated guides to CRM, ERP and the AI scan hub. Replace with your own MP4 files in /public/tutorials/ if you prefer.
landing.tutorial1Body: See how leads, contacts and quotes stay organised in one place — ready for follow-up and closing.
landing.tutorial2Body: Scan supplier invoices, track expenses and issued documents so your numbers stay accurate.
landing.tutorial3Body: Upload files, pick an AI engine and run OCR — structured data flows straight into ERP.

marketingDrawer.brandQuote: We organise the past, we build the future

aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.body: BSD-YBM is the product of over 20 years running offices, accounting and piles of paperwork. Yohanan Bukshpan distilled two decades of operational know-how into a smart AI system that turns office chaos into a precise management avenue.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.intro: We would love to hear from you — details below or quick WhatsApp.

executive.title: Organisational snapshot
executive.subtitle: Global cash flow, user activity and price alerts across all organisations.
executive.incomeHint: Sum of totals from all issued documents (non-cancelled), all organisations.
executive.expenseHint: Sum of AI-extracted totals on ERP documents across all organisations.
executive.noLogins: No sign-in records yet — they update after the next login.
executive.priceAlertsSub: Top 5 sharpest price increases (ERP, whole system)
executive.noSpikes: Not enough price observations to compare, or no sharp increases.

executiveCharts.title: Annual cash flow {year}
executiveCharts.subtitle: Revenue vs ERP expenses (by month, all organisations)

aiBubble.initialGreeting: Hello! I’m the avenue between your operations and AI. How can I help?
aiBubble.errorGeneric: Couldn’t get a reply. Try again shortly.
aiBubble.errorNetwork: Network error — check your connection and try again.
aiBubble.title: BSD-YBM AI

erpDash.netFlowIntro: Net flow (issued revenue minus scanned document expenses):
erpDash.scannerDesc: Upload a supplier invoice — BSD-YBM analyses prices and records observations for supplier comparison.

priceCompare.title: Price tracking: {name}
priceCompare.subtitle: Comparison of recent ERP purchases
priceCompare.insightBody: Unit gap between the last two purchases: ₪{diff}. Compare alternative suppliers or consolidate orders for volume discounts.

intelligencePage.title: Intelligence
intelligencePage.subtitle: Modules by role ({role}) — edit the map in lib/intelligence-access.ts

home.title: A workspace that's a bit smarter
home.description: BSD-YBM brings order to your documents and data. Simple interface, helpful AI, that's it — everything you need.

crm.title: CRM & Clients
crm.desc: Manage clients, quotes, and contracts in one clear page.

invoice.title: Invoices & ERP
invoice.desc: Generate documents and cash flow reports with order and clarity.

help.title: Help & Documentation
help.desc: Quick answers to questions and real-world working examples.

pt1.title: Clean, bright interface
pt1.desc: Simple design that doesn't distract — only what you need, when you need it.

pt2.title: Smart AI that helps
pt2.desc: Automatic data extraction from images and text with no surprises.

pt3.title: Languages & auto-detect
pt3.desc: The system detects your language when you sign in and switches everything for you.
